HeroItem.Title: Lobbyist Tracker
HeroItem.SubTitle: A cloud based SaaS software solution to track and record your Public Officials interactions with Lobbyists

ItemList: Complete software solution running in the cloud
AboutUsItem.Item1Description: Lobbyist Tracker is a SaaS platform built to enhance government transparency. It enables agencies, lobbyists, and journalists to record and analyze all public official interactions in one place.
AboutUsItem.Item2Description: We are a team of software developers and technology professionals who have extensive experience working in local governments developing software solutions.

PriceItem.Title: Lobbyist Tracker Pricing
PriceItem.Descr: Initial contract is for three years
FeatureCallouts: Payable on a yearly or monthly basis

HighlightItems.Title: Track Interactions
HighlightItems.Descr: Log meetings, calls, and correspondence between lobbyists and officials for transparent reporting.

HighlightItems.Title: Transparency
HighlightItems.Descr: Track, manage, and report every interaction between lobbyists and public officials — all in one secure SaaS platform.

HighlightItems.Title: Generate Reports
HighlightItems.Descr: Instantly export detailed summaries for compliance and auditing purposes.

HighlightItems.Title: Cloud-Based Security
HighlightItems.Descr: All records are stored safely in the cloud, with encryption and role-based access.

HighlightItems.Title: Admin Dashboard
HighlightItems.Descr: View statistics about all interactions in simple to view graphs and charts.

HighlightItems.Title: Continuous Updates
HighlightItems.Descr: New product features and improvements are rolled out every 90 days.
